app.footer: Spy — the word game. Play in person or online with friends.

home.title: Spy
home.subtitle_before: Everyone gets a word. One player gets a
home.subtitle_after: . Find the spy before they blend in.

rdv.title: Play with a friend nearby
rdv.desc: They scan your QR — you both land in the lobby.

passAndPlay.title: Pass-and-play
passAndPlay.desc: One phone, friends in the same room. No setup.

host.title: Host an online room
host.desc: Each friend joins from their own phone with a code.

join.title: Join a room
join.desc: Got a code from your host? Jump in.

howTo.title: How to play
howTo.step1_before: Everyone gets a word. One secret
howTo.step2: Go around the table. Each player says one short clue about their word.
howTo.step3: Discuss. Then vote. If you eliminate the spy, civilians win. If not, the spy wins.

discuss.title: Discuss
discuss.desc: Each player says one short clue about their word, then debate it out. Decide together who you think is the spy.
discuss.revealHint: Made up your minds? Tap to see who the spy actually was.

lobby.title: Pass-and-play
lobby.subtitle: Add everyone playing. Need at least 3.

none.label: No hint
none.hint: Spy gets no word at all — easiest to catch.

easy.label: Easy
easy.hint: Spy's hint is from a different category — easy to spot.

medium.label: Medium
medium.hint: Spy's hint is a sibling from the same category.

hard.label: Hard
hard.hint: Spy's hint is very close to the real word — classic.

lobby.needPlayers: Add at least 3 players to start.
lobby.needSource: Pick at least one word source.

playerCard.passInstruction: When it's safe, tap the card to reveal your word.
playerCard.spyHeadsUp_after: what the others have. It's a similar
playerCard.spyBluff: Bluff your clues — make them fit your word AND theirs.
playerCard.noHintBody: You don't know the word. Listen, blend in, and bluff.
playerCard.noHintBluff: Echo what others say. Don't be the first to commit.
playerCard.civBody: Everyone else (except the spy) has this same word. Find the spy.

pairPicker.label: Word sources
pairPicker.pickAtLeastOne: Pick at least one source to be able to start a round.

editList.notFoundDesc: This word list no longer exists.
editList.intro_before: Add your own civilian / spy pairs. The spy's hint should be
editList.name: List name

online.errNeedBoth: Need both a room code and a name.
online.fbWarnBody_before: Online mode needs a Firebase project. Create one at
online.fbWarnBody_after: and add a Realtime Database. Then copy the web-app config into a
online.fbWarnJoin: Ask whoever set up the site to add the Firebase env vars.
online.qrScanHint: Point your camera at the host's QR code.
online.qrInvalid: That QR code isn't a room link.
online.needPlayers: Need at least 3 players. Share the link!
online.waitingHost: Waiting for the host to start the round…
online.guestAdvanceWait: When everyone's ready, your host will advance to discussion.
online.discussDesc: Each player says one short clue about their word, then debate it out in person. Decide together who you think is the spy.
online.guestRevealWait: Host will reveal the spy when everyone's ready.
online.guestBackWait: Host can take everyone back to the lobby.
online.errNoPairs: No pairs available — select at least one category with pairs.
online.errCouldNotAllocate: Could not allocate a room code, try again
online.rdvConnectingHint: Both phones will end up in the same lobby.

android.title: Install Spy on your phone
android.body: Faster opens, works offline, full-screen game.

ios.title: Install on iPhone
ios.body_before: Tap the share icon ⎙ in Safari, then

food.name: Food & Drink
food.description: Edible stuff. Pairs lean tasty and close enough to confuse.

sports.name: Sports
sports.description: Things you do with your body, ideally outdoors.

tech.name: Tech
tech.description: Cables, screens, anything with a battery.

household.name: Household
household.description: Things in your kitchen, bathroom, garage.

jobs.name: Jobs & Roles
jobs.description: What people do for a living.

tricky.name: Tricky / Mixed
tricky.description: Pairs that cross categories. The spy will sweat.
